user_story: As a cataloger, I want the system to validate metadata fields against the correct authority lists, so that the data entered is accurate and consistent with Duke Core standards.

true_user_story: As a cataloger I want to be able to see/hear/watch/read all components associated on the with an item on the create/update screen so I don't have to leave the form.

user_story: As a cataloger, I want to view and edit metadata records directly within the create/update interface, so that I can efficiently verify and manage item information without switching contexts.
true_user_story: As a cataloger or collection manager I want to see all of the metadata for a record while I'm editing it so that I have the full context for the item I'm cataloging.

user_story: As a collection manager, I want to be able to report problems with individual items, so that issues can be documented and addressed promptly during the collection process.
true_user_story: As a collection manager I want each record to have a status so I can track the progress of the records in the collection.

user_story: As a collection manager, I want to be able to report problems with individual items, so that issues can be addressed promptly and collection quality is maintained.
true_user_story: As a collection manager I want statuses to include a status that flags a record as having a problem so we can track issues as the arise.

user_story: As a Trident administrator, I want to ensure that component files and administrative metadata support UTF-8 encoding, so that users with diverse language needs can add and manage content without character encoding issues.
true_user_story: As a cataloger I want Trident to support the UTF-8 character set so that I can use any character necessary when creating metadata.

user_story: As a cataloger, I want the system to validate descriptive metadata records against authority lists and metadata profiles, so that records are accurate and compliant during metadata ingestion.

epic: Integrate Digital Collections with other resources
user_story: As a Researcher, I want to view all media (images, audio, video) related to a book or collection item, so that I can better understand the item's context and relationships within the digital repository.
true_user_story: As a Archivist I want bi-directional linking between items in the digital collections and EAD finding aids

epic: Integrate Digital Collections with other resources
user_story: As a Researcher, I want to search for media items and view their relationships to books and collections, so that I can easily find and contextualize relevant resources across the digital collections.
true_user_story: As a End User I want to be able to see the physical context of an Item in a digital collection (i.e. See inside this folder; EAD)

epic: Integrate Digital Collections with other resources
user_story: As a Collection Manager, I want to monitor the progress of a digital collection and manage cataloger permissions, so that I can ensure the collection is accurately maintained and published on schedule.
true_user_story: As a Collection Manager I want my collection to be discoverable in the Catalog

user_story: As a Scanner Operator, I want to check components for quality and correctness, so that only accurate and high-quality digital content is produced.
true_user_story: As a Digital Production User (DPU) I want to be able to create Components.

user_story: As a Digital Production User (DPU), I want to associate a Metadata Profile with each Component so that the descriptive and administrative metadata are standardized and complete for every item in the project collection, ensuring proper management and discoverability of components in Trident system projects and compliance with metadata requirements for structural and descriptive records as specified in the workflow guidelines for component creation and management within the system, thus, so that I
true_user_story: As a DPU I want to create Technical Metadata with for Component.

user_story: As a DPU, I want to create and associate administrative and descriptive metadata records with each Component, so that all Components are properly documented and searchable within the system.
true_user_story: As a DPU I want to create Preservation Metadata for a Component.

user_story: As a DPU, I want to create and manage administrative metadata for each Component, so that all relevant information about the digital content is accurately recorded and easily accessible.
true_user_story: As a DPU I want to upload master surrogates to a Component.

user_story: As a Repository Manager, I want to associate structural metadata with items containing components, so that the organization and relationships of the components are clearly defined and discoverable.
true_user_story: As a DPU I want to add one or more Components to an Item.

user_story: As a DPU, I want each item with components to automatically include a structural metadata record, so that the relationships and organization of components are clearly defined and accessible.
true_user_story: As a DPU I want to create structural metadata for an Item so I can define the sequence of components.

user_story: As a Digital Production Manager, I want to review and approve components added by scanner operators, so that only high-quality and correct components are included in the digitized items.
true_user_story: As a Digital Production Developer (DPD) I want to group components that require digitization so that I can create "digitizable units".

user_story: As a Scanner Operator, I want to check components for quality and correctness after scanning, so that only accurate and complete digital items are added to the system.
true_user_story: As a DPU I want to check-out/check-in groups of Components.

user_story: As a Scanner Operator, I want to validate the quality and correctness of Components during digitization, so that only accurate and complete metadata is added to the system.
true_user_story: As a DPD I want to verify the correctness and completeness of components so that I can ensure quality standards are met.

user_story: As a Digital Production Manager, I want to add new components to an item so that all parts of the item are accurately represented in the digitization process and can be managed individually during scanning and quality control steps.  ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​, so that I
true_user_story: As a DPD I want to capture digitization statistics so that I can monitor Operator efficiency and make projections for future projects.

user_story: As a DPU, I want to add administrative metadata to a Component, so that the Component can be properly managed and tracked within Trident.
true_user_story: As a DPU I want Trident to create derivatives for me when I upload a Master.

user_story: As a Collection Manager, I want to verify and edit metadata records, so that the collection's information remains accurate and up to date.
true_user_story: As a User I want to monitor the progress of a digital collection project.

user_story: As a Digital Production Manager, I want to assign scanner operators to specific collections, so that digitization tasks are efficiently distributed and tracked.
true_user_story: As a user I want to see how many Items have been digitized.♦

user_story: As a Digital Production Manager, I want to assign scanner operators to specific collections, so that digitization tasks are efficiently managed and tracked.
true_user_story: As a user I want to see how many digitized Items have been described.♦

user_story: As a Digital Production Manager, I want to report problems with items and collections, so that issues can be tracked and resolved efficiently during the digitization process.
true_user_story: As a user I want to see how many Items have been published.♦

user_story: As a Collection Manager, I want to view and manage the relationships between items and their collections, so that I can efficiently track and organize project progress.
true_user_story: As Collection Manager or Sponsor I want to describe the collection.

user_story: As a cataloger, I want guidance on which authority lists to use for specific metadata fields, so that I can ensure consistent and accurate metadata entry for digitized items.
true_user_story: As a Preservation Librarian I want the relationship between masters and derivatives to be managed by the system so I don't have to.

user_story: As a Metadata Librarian, I want to assign a metadata profile to a collection, so that all items in the collection follow consistent metadata standards.
true_user_story: As a Metadata Librarian I want to define the metadata schema for a collection.

user_story: As a Metadata Librarian, I want to assign a metadata profile to a collection, so that items in the collection use consistent metadata fields and requirements.
true_user_story: As a Metadata librarian I want to define Authorities to be used for specific fields in a collection MD Schema.

user_story: As a Metadata Librarian, I want to provide guidance to catalogers on validation errors when editing DMR, so that metadata can be corrected and validated efficiently.
true_user_story: As a Metadata Librarian I want to define validation rules for specific fields in a collection.

user_story: As a Metadata Librarian, I want to provide guidance to catalogers on validation rules and authority lists, so that metadata is consistently and accurately described.
true_user_story: As a Metadata Librarian I want validation rules enforced when MD is submitted.
